finding: Adding pre-onset news changed no derivatives-based verdicts. Derivatives-only and news-only each explained four of five episodes: three overlapped, one was derivatives-only, and one was news-only. This LUNA sample does not establish that derivatives outperform news; it shows complementary evidence and one early move that derivatives explained before news did.
limitations: Five episodes from one historical event are not enough for a general claim.
Ragas evaluates generated rationale quality, not predictive superiority.
Post-onset news delay uses first ticker/text match, not a manually verified causal article.
